description_long: This is a large, stately house with a light stone or brick exterior and a prominent, dark gabled roof featuring multiple chimneys and decorative railings along the roofline. The front facade is symmetrical, with a central entryway beneath a covered porch supported by columns, and large rectangular windows on both floors. The house has a raised foundation with stone steps leading to the main entrance, and the windows are framed with detailed trim. The roof is complex, with intersecting gables and a central pediment above the entry. The rear of the house features a similar symmetry, with a covered porch area and additional large windows. The overall design suggests a blend of neoclassical and modern influences, with a focus on grandeur and balanced proportions.
description: A grand, two-story house with a light stone exterior, dark gabled roof, multiple chimneys, and symmetrical large windows. The front features a covered porch with columns and decorative roof railings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, a covered porch, and symmetrical large windows on both floors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the complex roof structure, and a balcony area on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view with a covered porch, central upper window, and symmetrical window arrangement similar to the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the window arrangement and the extension of the roof and balcony.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with stone steps, covered porch supported by columns, and a decorative pediment above the door.
